This indicates CMS data is available and queryable.\\n2) Live route behavior: /chairs and /desks currently return valid CSS+JS assets (200).\\n3) Critical inconsistency detected: / (homepage) HTML references stale CSS/JS chunk hashes that return 404. - Maintain existing Cloudinary folder structure (steelmade/chairs/series-name/)

- Validate URL format in schemas

- sanity/schemas/product.ts (mainImage field)
- sanity/schemas/category.ts (mainImage field if exists)

- Migration script (new)
